pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly creates and export_result.sh queries a project with this exact name.
setup_task.sh explicitly initializes the user 'Jane Doe' with this email address.
setup_task.sh explicitly initializes the user 'John Smith' with this email address.
setup_task.sh explicitly initializes the user 'Sarah Connor' with this email address.
Task description explicitly instructs to change John Smith's role to 'Guest'.
Task description explicitly instructs to add Sarah Connor with the 'User' role.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated user profiles and a dummy project ('Zebrafish Gene Editing') that are dynamically injected into the database via setup scripts. The expected final roles for John (Guest) and Sarah (User) match the exact requirements detailed in the task description.
